name: query
title: Query Value
description: Single-value KPI widget: one oversized numeric value, a muted metric caption, a signed percent delta (green up / red down) and a trend sparkline. Rendered by OOW.query from a declarative data-widget mount and deterministic from data-seed; accent modifiers recolour only the sparkline while the delta colour stays semantic. An optional interactive variant turns the tile into a focusable drill-down target.
